description: Style NoteIf you're looking for a sport-inspired, casual tee which won't let you down in either style or performance, then your search is over! This T-shirt from nike has a athletic approach, just what you need to perfect your effortlessly fashionable sportive look.Product DetailsGrey running T-shirt, V-neck, short sleeves, Nike swoosh on the left chest, stitched detailing along the sleeves, zipped pocket at the back right sideMaterial and Care85% polyester and 15% cottonMachine wash warm with like coloursDo not bleachTumble dry lowWarm ironSize and FitRegular fit
